name: cyber_signal
description: Signal Integrity (q.side_signal, slot 35, Cyber City gym-7 pack) end-to-end on Signal Tech Rell: nurse rumor pointer (tip_signal, gated not ci_signal_done, latches met_cyber_nurse), accept at the comms van (ci_signal_active + SIGNAL INTEGRITY title), scrub the three glitching-billboard props downtown in 1-2-3 order (each latches its ci_board_N via sidequest/signal/scrub_N with a unique actionbar tail, so a wrong-prop interact is caught twice), a premature turn-in nudge after board 1 (count-check holds: 'Not all scrubbed yet', no ci_signal_done), full turn-in (700 CD skewed payout via the unbranded Verified Rate rail + FEED SCRUBBED title + ci_signal_done), then the done-state entry. Available pre-Volt - NO prerequisite tags are faked and NO battle exists on this chain (zero TBCS stall exposure). Board say lines embed section-sign-k glitch codes, so screen needles sit on the plain-text side of each code run. reward/standard candies are NOT asserted (they scale on the memory_fragment score, unpinned here - canon precedent: miller/noncompliance assert only bespoke items); CobbleDollars ride upward on re-runs (payout rail has no reset, miller_walk precedent). DO NOT run before ground-probing _probe_pending - every tp Y below is an authored town-placement placeholder.

steps.comment: -- SITE NOTES: Cyber City downtown is a town safe zone (no mob spawns). Nurse Ampere 1478,65,1150; Rell's van 1470,65,1140 (10.6b SW of the nurse); board_1 1490,66,1132 (~22b E of the van, latch-spawned while we stand at the nurse); board_2 1560,66,1090 and board_3 1610,66,1110 are cross-downtown tp hops. All Ys are authored placeholders - see _probe_pending. interact_npc self-approaches (A* chase, 32b), so sub-30b hops need no walk step. --

steps.comment_: leftover-dialog guard: a prior scenario's stale screen would eat the first interact

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): the accept latch, the done latch, the three prop tags, the nurse-met latch --

steps.comment_: latch spawns within 40b + band_tags resync of the no_* inverses (tip_signal gates not ci_signal_done)

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Nurse Ampere rumor hub - tip_signal renders (gate: not ci_signal_done) and latches met_cyber_nurse --

steps.comment_: open_dialog swap to the rumors entry needs a packet round-trip before the dump

steps.wait_chat: scrubbed before management notices they are readable

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Rell at the comms van (10b SW) - accept. say[] rotates, so the any-of covers both lines --

expect_screen_text: Rell, city signals. I keep the boards lit. Lately they are lit with things I was never given to broadcast - a memo, plain as day, about a man who was retired and then unretired into never existing.
Management thinks nobody reads a glitch. Somebody should scrub the three worst boards before that stops being true. No cameras on you if you move quick.

steps.comment: -- beat 3: board 1 (1490,66,1132 - 22b E, nearest 'Glitching Billboard' by 70b+; the interact chase covers the gap). Say needles sit clear of the section-sign-k glitch runs --

expect_screen_text: we told them the founder retired

steps.comment: -- beat 4: premature turn-in - the count-check must HOLD with 1/3 boards --
-- beat 5: board 2 (cross-downtown tp - 95b, buildings defeat straight-line walking) --

steps.wait_chat: another board stops broadcasting the cover-up

steps.comment: -- beat 7: full turn-in - accepted entry (prio 30), payout via signal/reward --

expect_screen_text: Three boards, downtown. Get to each one and scrub the corrupted feed before a suit notices it is readable. I will keep the comms van between you and the cameras.
Same fault they had in Kalahar, the techs say. It started spreading the week the coin went soft. Scrub all three and come back.

steps.comment: -- beat 8: done-state entry (prio 40) replaces the accept --

expect_screen_text: Three boards, scrubbed. Every one of them was leaking the same story - the founder retired, then the founder never existed, both memos on the same loop. That is somebody editing the truth in public and getting sloppy.
The clean feed all routes through the north tower. If you want the boards to stop lying, that is where the signal comes from.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip every tag this scenario set (mystic precedent) so no other cyber scenario inherits the lane; CobbleDollars ride --
